author_bar: Author QQ: 86609013 | Website: chaseqiu.top | Commercial AI Software, Customer Acquisition Tools, Sales Websites, Custom Development
login_usage_text:
Before using the automation tool, please follow these steps strictly:

1. Click [Open Browser to Login X]: The program will launch Chrome and navigate to X homepage.
   Please manually enter your username and password in the browser to complete login.

2. Click [Save Current Cookie]: After successful login, click this button to save the login state locally.

3. Click [Load Cookie Test]: This will automatically open the browser. If you enter X homepage directly without needing to login,
   it means the Cookie is valid. You can now close the browser and start using subsequent automation features.
msg_opened: X opened, please login in browser
msg_cookie_not_exist: Cookie file not found, please save cookie first
msg_cookie_loaded: Logged in to X with Cookie
msg_browser_check: Browser opened, please check login status
msg_open_first: Please click 'Open X' and login before saving
join_guide_text:
1. Ensure you are logged into X
2. Add keywords to search
3. Click [Start Search and Join]
4. The program will visit https://x.com/i/communities/suggested to find related communities and try to join
join_group_confirm_start:
Are you sure you want to start auto joining communities?

Number of keywords: {}
video_url_placeholder: Enter X video URL, e.g.: https://x.com/user/status/1234567890
video_usage_text:
1. Copy X video share link
2. Paste into the input box above
3. Click "Download Video" button
4. Video will be automatically saved to downloads folder
5. Click "Open Download Folder" to view downloaded videos
6. Click "Open X" to login to X platform with Cookie
msg_save_cookie_first: Please save Cookie in [Login Management] first!
msg_select_file_warning: Please select media and text files first
login_dialog_info:
Get Cookie from F12 Developer Tools:
1. Press F12 to open Developer Tools
2. Switch to "Application" tab
3. Find "Cookies" -> "https://x.com" on the left
4. Right-click any Cookie, select "Copy all"
5. Paste into the text box below

Or paste Cookie text directly from browser address bar
